raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Team recognition","name":"How did it feel to see the team's response to the payments refactor success?","description":"Explores their feelings about recognition and impact on the team.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Exploring quieter energy","name":"What do you think is behind your quieter energy this week?","description":"Encourages reflection on their current state and any underlying factors.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Mentoring mentoring.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Billing rewrite alignment","name":"What are your expectations for the billing rewrite, and how can we align on blockers or dependencies are you currently facing that we haven't discussed?","description":"Invites a deeper look at any hidden obstacles affecting their aspirations","name":"Where do you see yourself wanting to grow in the next few months?","description":"Encourages them to think about their growth trajectory and aspirations.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Team engagement","name":"How engaged do you feel with the team right now, and what could enhance
